newsItems.title: Micron, Intel and AMD add $2 trillion in value in Q2 rally
newsItems.summary: Investing.com -- Three major chipmakers gained about $2 trillion in combined market value during the second quarter as investors expanded their artificial intelligence holdings beyond Nvidia.

newsItems.title: How Microsoft Stock Rises 50% To $550?

newsItems.title: Is The Market Ignoring The Real Growth Story In Salesforce Stock?
newsItems.summary: It’s no secret that Salesforce (CRM) stock has been a tough holding. With shares down 41% over the last year, the market’s verdict seems clear: the era of hyper-growth is over, and with it, the premium valuation. The conversation is almost entirely about the top line.
